Interface IDatasetContainer3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that return datasets by name, ID and index.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("1B7498C6-F47B-4AC6-A716-835B702A9CAC")]
public interface IDatasetContainer3 : IDatasetContainer2, IDatasetContainer
